mapper.sql: buey.id, buey.created_time, buey.created_timestamp, buey.created_by, buey.created_id, buey.modified_time, buey.modified_timestamp, buey.modified_by, buey.modified_id, buey.deleted, buey.version, buey.remark, buey.user_id, buey.yubikey_public_key, buey.biz_type
mapper.delete: delete from user_extend_yubikey where user_id in
